variables.name: AGE_AT_COLLECTION
variables.description: Subject's age at time of primary biosample collection (not available for 2019 assays)

variables.name: ANALYTE_ISOLATION_BATCH
variables.description: Identifier for samples whose DNA was extracted at the same time

variables.name: ANALYTE_ISOLATION_LAB
variables.description: Lab which performed the analyte isolation

variables.name: ANALYTE_ISOLATION_YEAR
variables.description: Year in which DNA was extracted from the primary biosample

variables.name: ANALYTE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Identifier for analyte isolated from primary biosample

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of analyte to be measured

variables.name: Assay_batch
variables.description: Data processing batch

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Anatomical site at which biosample was taken

variables.name: Barcode
variables.description: Illumina chip Sentrix barcode

variables.name: COLLECTION_VISIT
variables.description: Study visit at which the primary biosample was collected

variables.name: COLLECTION_YEAR
variables.description: Year in which the primary biosample was collected (not available for 2019 assays)

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Tissue sub-type or type of cellular or extra-cellular material derived from primary biosample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status of the sample

variables.name: OMICS_ASSAY_LAB
variables.description: Name of assay lab to which the samples were sent

variables.name: PRIMARY_BIOSAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Identifier for primary biosample

variables.name: PRIMARY_BIOSAMPLE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of primary biosample

variables.name: SAMPLE_CONTAINER_ID
variables.description: Identifier for the sample shipment plate

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: DNA methylation sample identifier

variables.name: SAMPLE_WELL_ID
variables.description: Identifier for the well within the sample shipment plate

variables.name: SUBJECT_FASTING_HOURS
variables.description: Number of hours subject fasted prior to when biosample was taken

variables.name: UBERON_ID
variables.description: UBERON ontology identifier for Type of primary biosample

variables.name: UBERON_TERM
variables.description: UBERON ontology term for type of primary biosample

variables.name: decodeDate
variables.description: Earliest date shown for 'AutoDecode' action in the .idat 'RunInfo' table.  Presumably related to the chip manufacturing date.

variables.name: extractDate
variables.description: Earliest date shown for 'Scan', 'Register' and 'Extract' actions in the .idat 'RunInfo' table.  Presumably date when the chip was scanned after hybridization, extension and staining.

variables.name: nSNPsRead
variables.description: Value reported as 'nSNPsRead' in Illumina .idat file header

variables.name: p.0.01
variables.description: Fraction of CpG sites which pass a detection p-value threshold of 0.01

variables.name: p.0.05
variables.description: Fraction of CpG sites which pass a detection p-value threshold of 0.05

variables.name: SAMPLE_CONTAINER_ID
variables.description: Identifier for the sample shipment plate

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: RNAseq sample identifier

variables.name: SAMPLE_WELL_ID
variables.description: Identifier for the well within the sample shipment plate

variables.name: SUBJECT_FASTING_HOURS
variables.description: Number of hours subject fasted prior to when biosample was taken

variables.name: UBERON_ID
variables.description: UBERON ontology identifier for Type of primary biosample

variables.name: UBERON_TERM
variables.description: UBERON ontology term for type of primary biosample

variables.name: AGE_AT_COLLECTION
variables.description: Subject's age in years at time of tissue collection

variables.name: ANALYTE_ISOLATED
variables.description: Type of analyte material isolated

variables.name: ANALYTE_ISOLATION_BATCH
variables.description: Batch number of when the analyte was isolated

variables.name: ANALYTE_ISOLATION_LAB
variables.description: Identifier for what lab conducted the isolation

variables.name: ANALYTE_ISOLATION_YEAR
variables.description: Identifer of year the analyte was isolated

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of omics assay to be performed, generally one of the following four values: "RNA", "DNA", "protein", or "metabolite"

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Anatomical site at which biosample was taken, e.g. "arm vein", "lung", "inner oral cavity"

variables.name: COLLECTION_VISIT
variables.description: Study visit when the primary biosample was collected (relevant for longitudianal studies with multiple waves of clinic visits).

variables.name: COLLECTION_YEAR
variables.description: Year in which primary biosample was collected (informative for storage time)

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue subtype derived from the Primary biosample, or if no subfractionation was done, the primary biosample type; e.g. plasma for proteins and metabolites; PBMC, T-cell, or monocyte for RNA; blood buffy coat for DNA

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status of the sample. For non-cancer studies, all values should be "no". For cancer studies, values should be "yes" or "no". (NCBI Biosample characteristic)

variables.name: OMICS_ASSAY_LAB
variables.description: Name of the omics center to which the samples were sent

variables.name: PRIMARY_BIOSAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified biorepository ID for the tissue sample that was collected. Relevant when multiple biosamples may have been taken from the same subject at different times; also relevant when multiple analytes were extracted from the same primary biosample (e.g. blood draw); identifier must be anonymized (de-identified)

variables.name: PRIMARY_BIOSAMPLE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of primary biosample, e.g. "venous blood", "lung epithelium"; be as specific as possible

variables.name: SAMPLE_CONTAINER_ID
variables.description: Identifier for sample plate, box or other container used for shipping samples to the assay center

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: TOPMed identifier for each sample aliquot sent to the assay center. MUST use TOPMed identifiers - TOR (RNA), TOP (protein), TOM (metabolite), TOE (DNA for methylation assay)

variables.name: SAMPLE_WELL_ID
variables.description: Identifier for well, tube, or other subdivision of the sample shipping container

variables.name: UBERON_ID
variables.description: UBERON ontology identifier for type of primary biosample; value is "0013756" for venous blood, https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols/ontologies/uberon for others

variables.name: UBERON_TERM
variables.description: UBERON ontology term for type of primary biosample, e.g. "venous blood", https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols/ontologies/uberon for others

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of analyte to be measured

variables.name: Analyte_isolation_lab
variables.description: Lab which performed the analyte isolation

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Anatomical site at which biosample was taken

variables.name: Collection_visit
variables.description: Study visit identifier for when the primary biosample was collected.

variables.name: Draw_days
variables.description: Days since randomization/enrollment to when biosample was taken

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Tissue sub-type or type of cellular or extra-cellular material derived from primary biosample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status of the sample

variables.name: Primary_biosample_ID
variables.description: Identifier for primary biosample

variables.name: Primary_biosample_type
variables.description: Type of primary biosample

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Identifier for aliquot of material or isolated analyte from which assay was performed

variables.name: Subject_fasting_hours
variables.description: Number of hours subject fasted prior to when biosample was taken

variables.name: UBERON_ID
variables.description: UBERON ontology identifier for Type of primary biosample

variables.name: UBERON_Term
variables.description: UBERON ontology term for type of primary biosample

variables.name: assay_lab
variables.description: Name of assay lab to which the samples were sent

variables.name: sample_box_ID
variables.description: Identifier for the sample shipment box

variables.name: sample_row_column_ID
variables.description: Identifier for the row and column of the sample shipment box

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: Funding_Source
variables.description: Project funding source

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

variables.name: Study_Name
variables.description: TOPMed-assigned short study name (1:1 with TOPMed phs number)

variables.name: TOPMed_Phase
variables.description: TOPMed Phase

variables.name: TOPMed_Project
variables.description: TOPMed Project that funded sequencing

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent Group

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Reported gender of subject

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the SUBJECT_SOURCE repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: WHI dbGaP Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Repository name for dbGaP study also containing this individual

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID
